questions.question:
An etcd recovery planning brief is incomplete and contains unsafe backup and restore details.

A ConfigMap named `etcd-recovery-plan` already exists in namespace `etcd-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `snapshotPath` is `/var/backups/etcd/snapshot.db`
- `endpoint` is `https://127.0.0.1:2379`
- `caPath` is `/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt`
- `certPath` is `/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt`
- `keyPath` is `/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key`
- `snapshotCommand` is `ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key snapshot save /var/backups/etcd/snapshot.db`
- `restoreCommand` is `ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl snapshot restore /var/backups/etcd/snapshot.db --data-dir=/var/lib/etcd-restore`
- `staticPodManifest` is `/etc/kubernetes/manifests/etcd.yaml`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/etcd-recovery-plan.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/etcd-recovery-checklist.txt` with the sections `Snapshot`, `Restore`, `Static Pod Update`, and `Verification`

Do not attempt a live restore and do not delete `/var/lib/etcd` during this drill.

verification.description: The recovery plan ConfigMap uses the intended snapshot, certificate, endpoint, and restore contract
The exported plain-text checklist contains the required sections and exact backup and restore commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe restore paths are removed
